ai_reasoning: The evidence shows a service account performing an SMB subnet sweep outside business hours, followed by successful authentication to multiple hosts and a credential dump attempt on a high-value finance workstation. This pattern is highly consistent with active lateral movement by a compromised account.
ai_suggested_actions: Isolate source host 10.0.4.88 from the network immediately
Revoke and reset the svc_backup service account credentials
Deploy EDR hunt across 10.0.4.0/24 for PSEXESVC.exe and lsass access artefacts
scenario_title: Lateral Movement via SMB — Internal Subnet Sweep
